scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 407 Proxy Authentication Required [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Proxy-Authenticate: Digest realm="213.152.17.108", nonce="5a02d7116139eb992ffb66da730bf04096cb0676", qop="auth", stale=true Content-Length: 0
SIP/2.0 100 Giving a try [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Server: Keyyo-S4-P Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0
SIP/2.0 180 Ringing [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=123 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Server: Keyyo B2BUA Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 183 Session Progress [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=123 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Server: Keyyo B2BUA Supported: replaces, x-sipura Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=b2b 206721381 206721381 IN IP4 192.168.22.151 s=b2b c=IN IP4 83.136.164.33 t=0 0 m=audio 59968 RTP/AVP 8 18 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20 a=maxptime:150 a=sendrecv a=nortpproxy:yes

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=123 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Server: Keyyo B2BUA Supported: replaces, x-sipura Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]

INVITE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip];tag=123 To: sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 102 INVITE Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: Keyyo B2BUA Supported: replaces, x-sipura Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=b2b 206721381 206721382 IN IP4 192.168.23.234 s=b2b c=IN IP4 83.136.164.33 t=0 0 m=audio 59968 RTP/AVP 8 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20 a=maxptime:150 a=sendrecv a=nortpproxy:yes

ACK sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=TCP SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip];tag=123 To: sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 102 ACK [routes] Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
